topic: My car's odometer drops by twelve miles every Sunday morning
title: My Car's Odometer Drops Twelve Miles Every Sunday Morning | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My car's odometer drops by twelve miles every Sunday morning. The number always ends in nine.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a car dashboard at night showing an odometer reading with the last digit ending in nine, dim cabin glow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Two thousand fourteen Camry. Bought used. Eighty four thousand miles when I got it.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior of a Toyota Camry parked in a residential driveway at dusk, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I check the dash before I drive. Habit.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hand on a steering wheel, the dashboard cluster lit, no face visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: First Sunday in April. Twelve miles less than Saturday night.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of an odometer display showing a five digit number ending in nine, daylight ambient cabin, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a hand reaching toward a digital odometer display, only the hand visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Next Sunday. Same drop. Twelve miles. Ending in nine.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a car odometer at dawn showing a number ending in nine, dew visible on the windshield edge, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Took a photo every Saturday night.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone displaying a saved photograph of a car odometer, dim ambient kitchen light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Six weeks of photos. Six Sunday mornings. Same exact mileage drop.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a stack of six smartphone photographs of an odometer side by side, the numbers visible in each, dim home office light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Mechanic said the odometer cannot drop. Not without rolling it back.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a mechanic's garage with a car on a lift, a mechanic in coveralls seen from behind examining the dashboard, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Installed a dash cam pointed at the dashboard. Sunday morning. Two AM. Footage went black.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a dash cam mounted on a car windshield, screen showing a recording mode indicator, dim interior cabin light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Footage resumed at two thirteen. Twelve miles less on the dash.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of dashcam footage paused on a black screen with a timestamp of two AM visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The cabin light was on. I never turn it on.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a car interior with the cabin dome light on, viewed from the driver's seat, dim early morning ambient, vertical 9:16 framing
